message:
fix(dolt): stop wisp ID double-prefixing and add wisp fallback to ResolvePartialID

Two bugs fixed:
1. wispPrefix() generated bd-wisp-wisp-<hash> because IDPrefix='wisp' was
   appended via configPrefix+"-"+IDPrefix, then "-wisp" was unconditionally
   appended again. Now IDPrefix provides the suffix directly.
2. ResolvePartialID() only searched issues table via SearchIssues; the
   DoltStore merges wisps but transaction-level SearchIssues does not.
   Added explicit ephemeral fallback search to ensure wisps are always
   resolvable by partial ID.

Closes: beads-yzh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
